text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer has always felt inferior to Mejiro
McQueen and the other Mejiros because they've
always managed to work hard without running
away. She feels unable to face them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there is one thing the runaway Mejiro Palmer
has that the others don't. She's found a strong
friendship she wouldn't have had otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios decides to run in the Takarazuka
Kinen in order to cheer for Mejiro Palmer directly
beside her.
